description.value:
Frequency once every 10 minutes

You have a MAIL (Messaging Augmentation Integrated LFAN), which allows you to efficiently communicate information to others by translating it into a form that can be efficiently transmitted to their nervous system. You use your LFAN to transmit information to the nervous system of an adjacent willing creature, imparting to that target an amount of information in an instant that could otherwise be communicated in 10 minutes.

Special As long as you have a MAIL, you gain a special form of limited telepathy that allows you to communicate mentally with any raxilite within 30 feet as long as they share a language with you.
